issue_title: If a polygon is dragged such that the cursor leaves the map container, map is no longer scrollable
issue_body_preview:
1. Create a Polygon

![screen shot 2017-08-25 at 3 37 38 pm](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/16004285/29731771-6221af7c-89ab-11e7-8784-b026acd18769.png)


2. Drag the Polygon such the the cursor leaves the map container.

![screen shot 2017-08-25 at 3 37 44 pm](https://user-images.g
test_description_zh: 在地图上创建一个多边形，然后拖拽该多边形使鼠标光标移出地图容器边界，释放鼠标后将光标移回地图内，尝试进行地图的拖拽滚动和缩放操作。
expected_result_zh: 拖拽多边形时即使光标离开了地图容器，释放鼠标后地图仍可正常滚动、缩放，地图交互功能不会被锁定或失效。
